English: Select an episode.

Japanese: 新しいエピソードが 追加されました。
English: A brand new Episode has been added.

Japanese: ゲームを中断します
English: Suspending game.

Japanese: ロードに失敗しました
English: Load failed.

Japanese: ‥‥保存中‥‥ 電源を切らないでください
English: Saving... Do not turn power off.

Japanese: 手がかりになるものはない。
English: No clues here.

Japanese: 手がかりになるものはない。
English: There aren't any clues here.

Japanese: ぼくはもう・・・ ダメだあああ・・・・
English: I can't... take... any more... Nooooo!

Japanese: 今の発言は、この証拠品のデータと ムジュンしています！
English: Your Honor! That statement contradicts this evidence!

Japanese: どこがですか？ 特におかしいところはないが‥‥。
English: It does? I don't see anything contradictory...

Japanese: え。そうですか？
English: Huh? Really?

Japanese: 異議は認められません。
English: Objection overruled.

Japanese: 弁護人は、もっと慎重に 発言してください！
English: Try to think before you make accusations, Mr. Wright!

Japanese: （しまった！ 失敗したみたいだ‥‥）
English: (Whoops! That didn't go so well.)

Japanese: 今の証人の発言は、 あきらかにヘンです！
English: The witness's statement is clearly faulty, Your Honor!

Japanese: 残念だが、私にはヘンなところは 見あたりません。
English: I'm sorry, but I can see nothing faulty.

Japanese: ‥‥やむを得ません。弁護人には ペナルティを与えます。
English: Unfortunately, I will have to penalize you, Mr. Wright.

Japanese: （うう。ぼくの カン違いだったのか‥‥？）
English: (Ugh, I must be on the wrong track...?)

Japanese: この証拠品は、今の証言の ムジュンをハッキリ示しています！
English: This evidence clearly reveals the contradiction in that statement, Your Honor!

Japanese: ‥‥その証拠品と今の発言が、 どう関係するのですかな？
English: How exactly are the evidence and the statement just now related?

Japanese: ‥‥しませんかね、やっぱり。
English: They aren't, are they...

Japanese: 全然しませんね。
English: Not at all.

Japanese: 弁護人。もっと、ちゃんと 考えてから発言するように。
English: Mr. Wright, please think the facts over before making accusations.

Japanese: （‥‥裁判長の心証が 悪くなったみたいだ‥‥）
English: (I don't think that won me any points with the judge...)

Japanese: 裁判長！　今の証人の発言を どう思われますか！
English: Your Honor! What do you think about the witness's statement?

Japanese: え‥‥。 どうと言われても‥‥。
English: Uh... I'm not sure I follow you.

Japanese: あきらかに、その、ムジュン‥‥ してると‥‥思うんですけど‥‥。
English: It clearly, er, contradicts the... um... I thought...

Japanese: そんな顔で言われても 説得力に欠けた感じがしますね。
English: You don't sound very sure, Mr. Wright.

Japanese: 異議は却下します。
English: Objection overruled.

Japanese: （‥‥裁判長の心証が 悪くなったみたいだ‥‥）
English: (I don't think that won me any points with the judge...)

Japanese: 裁判長！　ただ今の証人の 発言を、どう思われますか！
English: Your Honor! What do you think of the witness's statement!?

Japanese: そうですなあ。‥‥なんの 問題もないと思いますが。
English: Hmm... I don't really see any problem with it.

Japanese: ‥‥‥‥じつは、 私もそう思っていました。
English: Actually... I don't either.

Japanese: いやいや。 ごまかしてもムダですぞ！
English: Well then what are you making a fuss for!?

Japanese: もっとよく考えてから 発言してください！
English: Think before you speak, young lady!

Japanese: （‥‥見込みちがいだった みたいね‥‥千尋！）
English: (Looks like you missed the mark on that one, Mia!)

Japanese: 今の証言‥‥この証拠品と ムジュンしていますっ！
English: Your Honor! That statement contradicts this evidence!

Japanese: どこが、ですかな‥‥？ 私には、よくわかりませんが。
English: In what way...? I'm not sure I understand.

Japanese: 私にも、ハッキリとは‥‥
English: Actually... I don't quite get it either.

Japanese: ‥‥ハッキリしてから 発言するように。
English: Well, make sure you do before you speak out again!

Japanese: （うう‥‥怒られちゃったわ。 負けちゃダメよ、千尋！）
English: (Aghh... He's mad at me now. But you can't give up yet, Mia!)

Japanese: この証拠品は、被告人のウソを 立証していますか？
English: Does this evidence establish that the defendant is lying?

Japanese: わ、私に聞いて どうするんですかッ！
English: D-Don't ask me! You're the one who's supposed to know!

Japanese: すみません。まだまだ 新米なものですから。
English: Oops, sorry. This is all still kind of new to me...

Japanese: 弁護側の異議は却下。 ペナルティを与えます！
English: Well, I've got something new for you, too -- a new penalty! Objection overruled!

Japanese: （なかなかムズカシイものね‥‥）
English: (This isn't going as smoothly as I had hoped...)

Japanese: ただ今の証言は、 アキラカにムジュンしています！
English: The witness's testimony just now is clearly contradictory, Your Honor!

Japanese: あるいは、そうかもしれません。
English: It could be...

Japanese: で、ですよね！　やっぱり！
English: It has to be, right!? I knew it!

Japanese: ただ‥‥あなたの提出した証拠は、 コンキョとして認められません。
English: However, your evidence doesn't show whatever contradiction you think you see.
Um...

Japanese: 弁護側の異議は却下します。 もう一度、考えなおすように。
English: Objection overruled. Try to think it over again.

Japanese: （‥‥裁判長の心証が 悪くなっちゃったわ‥‥）
English: (Well, there goes a few points with the Judge...)

Japanese: 裁判長！　ただ今の証人の 発言を、どう思われますか！
English: Your Honor! What do you think of the witness's statement!?

Japanese: なんとも思いません。 あなたは、いかがですかな？
English: I don't think anything of it. How about you?

Japanese: 私も、ベツに。
English: I guess I don't think anything of it either...

Japanese: じゃあ、問題ありませんね。
English: Then we don't have a problem. But we do have a penalty.

Japanese: （問題ないなら、 見逃してくれればいいのに）
English: (If there wasn't a problem, couldn't he just let it slide...?)

Japanese: 今の証言‥‥この証拠品と ムジュンしていますっ！
English: Your Honor! That statement contradicts this evidence!

Japanese: 申しわけないが‥‥
English: I'm sorry, but...

Japanese: あなたの、その人差し指のほうが ムジュンしているのでは‥‥？
English: I think the only thing out of place here is that pointer finger of yours.

Japanese: あるいは、そうかもしれません。
English: That could very well be...

Japanese: ‥‥もう一度、 考えなおしていただきましょう。
English: Here, take this penalty and try thinking things through again.

Japanese: （大丈夫！　人差し指は、 ヒトをさすためにあるんだから）
English: (What's the problem!? Pointer fingers are made for pointing!)

Japanese: この証拠品は、被告人のウソを 立証していますよね？
English: This evidence establishes that the defendant is lying, right?

Japanese: 私にカクニンを求めないように！
English: Don't ask me to confirm your facts!

Japanese: す、すみません。‥‥私、弁護席に 立つの、今日が初めてですから‥‥
English: S-Sorry... This is my first time handling a case...

Japanese: ‥‥忘れられない法廷に してあげましょう。
English: Well, let's make it a memorable occasion... with a penalty.

Japanese: （新人なんだから、サービス してくれればいいのに‥‥）
English: (And here I thought he would go easy on me because I'm new...)

Japanese: 今の発言は、この証拠品のデータと ムジュンしているッ！
English: That statement contradicts the data provided by this piece of evidence!

Japanese: どこが、ですかな？ 特におかしいところはないが‥‥。
English: It does? How do you mean?

Japanese: それがすでにオカシイと 言っているのだッ！
English: Forgive me, Your Honor, but you yourself just said that it does!

Japanese: 私にギロンをふっかけないように！
English: Don't try to play mind games with me!

Japanese: （‥‥いかん。どうも この席はまだ、慣れないようだ）
English: (Curses... It appears I have yet to adjust to being on this side of the courtroom.)

Japanese: 裁判長！　今の証人の発言を どう思われるかッ！
English: Your Honor! What do you think of the witness's statement!?

Japanese: 問題なし、と考えますな。
English: I don't think there is a problem with it.

Japanese: フッ‥‥
English: Hmph...

Japanese: そこまで言うのであれば、 いたしかたあるまい‥‥。
English: You say that with such gusto that I suppose I must agree that is all there is to it.

Japanese: ミョーなところで カッコつけないように！
English: Don't get smart with me! Get smart with this penalty!

Japanese: （どうやら‥‥私もたまには まちがうようだな）
English: (It would appear that even I can make mistakes...)

Japanese: この証拠品は、今の証言の ムジュンをハッキリ示してるッ！
English: This evidence clearly reveals the contradiction in that statement, Your Honor!

Japanese: ザンネンですが‥‥ 認めるわけにはいきませんな。
English: Unfortunately, I'm afraid I can't accept that.

Japanese: ‥‥ミゴトだ、裁判長‥‥
English: Well done, Your Honor.

Japanese: は、はい‥‥？
English: W-What?

Japanese: 今のは、あなたを少し、 試してみただけのこと、だ。
English: I was only testing you just now.

Japanese: それならば、ペナルティの味も 試させてあげましょう！
English: Well then, why don't you try testing this penalty, too!?

Japanese: （‥‥い、いらぬコトを 言ってしまったな‥‥）
English: (It looks like I shouldn't have spoken in haste...)

Japanese: 氏名：尾並田　美散
English: Name: Terry Fawles

Japanese: 罪状：誘拐殺人
English: Charge: Kidnapping, Murder

Japanese: 量刑：死刑
English: Sentence: Death Penalty

Japanese: 脱走後、尾並田は
English: After escaping, Fawles

Japanese: 美柳　勇希巡査部長と
English: met with, and then

Japanese: 接触。その後、殺害。
English: murdered, Sergeant
Valerie Hawthorne.

Japanese: 脱走から約８時間後、
English: Recaptured on Eagle Mountain

Japanese: 吾童山中にて脱走犯の身柄を確保。
English: about 8 hours after
his escape.
